# Preserver

> Preserver is a professional mobile app for iOS and Android that captures text, voice, photos and video — each automatically stamped with the exact time, date and GPS coordinates at the moment of capture. No account required. No signal needed. Data stays on your device.

Preserver is used across 70+ industries wherever timestamped, GPS-verified records matter: trades and construction, healthcare, field research, legal and compliance, journalism, agriculture, and personal record-keeping. It works completely offline via satellite GPS.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://preserver.me/): Overview of Preserver — what it does, pricing, features and how to purchase.
- [Use Cases](https://preserver.me/uses/): 70+ industry use cases across Health & Care, Trades & Construction, Field & Remote Work, Legal & Compliance, Media & Research, Events & Hospitality, and Personal & Lifestyle.
- [FAQ](https://preserver.me/faq/): Questions covering pricing, privacy, features, platforms and professional use.
- [Blog](https://preserver.me/blog/): Articles on GPS metadata, field documentation, pricing and voice vs text capture.

## Blog articles

- [Why GPS Metadata Matters More Than You Think](https://preserver.me/blog/gps-metadata/): How GPS coordinates are embedded in photos, why most apps strip them, and why keeping that metadata matters for evidence.
- [How Tradespeople Use Timestamped Photos to Protect Themselves](https://preserver.me/blog/tradies/): Before/after job documentation for dispute resolution and insurance.
- [Why We Chose One-Time Pricing](https://preserver.me/blog/ad-funded/): Why Preserver is a $49 USD one-time purchase with no subscription or ads.
- [Field Research Without Wi-Fi: Preserver in Remote Australia](https://preserver.me/blog/offline-field/): Offline-first capture for researchers and field workers without mobile coverage.
- [Voice Notes vs Typed Notes: When to Use Each](https://preserver.me/blog/voice-vs-text/): Practical guide to choosing the right capture type.

## About

- **Developer:** Preserver
- **Australian address:** Brisbane, Australia
- **US address:** Preserver LLC, 1234 Cranberry Avenue, Sunnyvale, California 94087, USA
- **Platforms:** iOS (App Store), Android (Google Play)
- **Price:** $49 USD one-time purchase (perpetual licence)
- **Privacy:** No account required. No data sold. Captures stored on-device only.
- **App Store:** https://apps.apple.com/au/app/preserver/id6443649784
- **Google Play:** https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=au.com.observerapp.observer
- **Contact:** https://preserver.me/contactus/
